2026-04-21JUSOther Than Statutory AuthorityAppointment of a member of the Independent Judicial Advisory Committee for the Province of Newfoundland and LabradorAppointment of Christian Hurley of Portugal Cove-St. Philip’s, Newfoundland and Labrador, to be a member of the Independent Judicial Advisory Committee for the Province of Newfoundland and Labrador, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.N/A
subject: Appointment of a member of the Independent Judicial Advisory Committee for the Province of Newfoundland and Labrador
precis: Appointment of Christian Hurley of Portugal Cove-St. Philip’s, Newfoundland and Labrador, to be a member of the Independent Judicial Advisory Committee for the Province of Newfoundland and Labrador, to hold office during pleasure for a term of three years.
